coreIssue: This 1:1 is likely about whether Tom has recalibrated to Principal expectations on the new team or is still delivering below Principal scope.
openingQuestion: How are you defining Principal-level impact on this team today, and where do you think your work this cycle has matched or missed that bar?
listenFor: whether he names specific places he aligned expectations early with peers or leaders
whether he volunteers a cross-team decision, tradeoff, or judgment call he owned beyond delivery
whether he stays in execution details or asks clarifying questions about Principal scope on this team
avoid: do not turn this into a vague critique of "not being strategic" without concrete examples
do not answer the role-definition question for him too early before testing his current assumptions
goodOutcome: You and Tom have agreed what Principal-level impact means on this team and identified one cross-team area where he should exercise Principal judgment and ownership.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one recent example where Tom delivered solidly but did not create visible Principal-level leverage, so you can ground the conversation in observable work.
